title: nasturtium pyrenaicum
intro: Nasturtium pyrenaicum, a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, is commonly known as Pyrenean cress or Pyrenean watercress. This plant is prized for its edible leaves and stems, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The leaves and stems of Nasturtium pyrenaicum have been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, due to their high content of vitamins A and C, and other essential nutrients. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are believed to provide numerous health benefits when consumed or applied topically.
